coordinator_investigation.full_path_type: integration-tests — NOT production src/main/java of a shippable module
coordinator_investigation.caller_search_result: CipherKeyGenerator referenced ONLY in its own source file — no production caller, no production config, no bean XML wiring outside integration-test scope
coordinator_investigation.key_analysis: 32 hex chars = 128-bit AES key. Hardcoded in integration-test CDI bean. Implements CipherKeySupplier — used to supply RememberMe encryption key in Jakarta EE CDI integration test environment only.
coordinator_investigation.production_risk: NONE — key is scoped to integration-test artifact. Not shipped in production jars. Test environments using this key are isolated. No evidence of this key appearing in production configuration files.
coordinator_investigation.training_data_implication: Record is valid as a hardcoded_key_or_secret finding. Security concern is real and correctly identified. The mitigating context (test-only scope) should be reflected in usage_context label.

decision_rationale: Hardcoded key confirmed as integration-test-only artifact. org.apache.shiro.testing.cdi package and integration-tests/ path confirm test scope. No production usage path exists. security_concern=hardcoded_key_or_secret is correctly assigned and valuable as a training example of test-key hardcoding anti-pattern. Minor label correction: usage_context should be 'test_fixture' not 'library_internal' to accurately reflect test-only scope.

label_correction_instruction.reason: CipherKeyGenerator is in integration-tests/jakarta-ee/src/main/java/org/apache/shiro/testing — test fixture scope, not production library code.

updated_adjudication_record.adjudicator_notes: Human coordinator review complete. Hardcoded AES-128 key (34D7E5C61B87A38C971B3716AED7899E) confirmed as integration-test CDI bean only — package org.apache.shiro.testing.cdi, path integration-tests/jakarta-ee. No production caller found (grep search returns single file only). security_concern=hardcoded_key_or_secret is correct and valuable training signal. Minor label correction applied: usage_context changed from 'library_internal' to 'test_fixture'. Escalation resolved — pipeline blocker cleared.

label_corrections.reason: CipherKeyGenerator lives under integration-tests/jakarta-ee in org.apache.shiro.testing.cdi — test fixture scope confirmed.
